5-meo-malt.dose_note: NOTE: There are inconsistent reports on the drugs effects. It is recommended to start low and raise dosages slowly.
5-meo-malt.name: 5-meo-malt

properties.dose: Oral Light: 15-25mg Common: 25-50mg Strong: 50mg+ | Insufflated Light: 5-10mg Common: 10-20mg Strong: 20mg+ | Vapourized Light: 5-10mg Common: 10-15mg Strong: 15-20mg | There are inconsistent reports on the drugs effects. It is recommended to start low and raise dosages slowly.
properties.duration: Oral: 2-4 hours. | Insufflated: 1-3 hours. | Vapourized: 0.5-1.5 hours.
properties.effects: Euphoria, empathy, insight, brightened colour, Closed/Open eye visuals, enhanced tactile sensation, mental/physical stimulation, decreased appetite, pupil dilation, restlessness, change in perception, ego softening, sweating/chills, muscle tension, confusion, insomnia.
properties.onset: Oral: 5-30 minutes. | Insufflated: 5-15 minutes. | Vapourized: 1-5 minutes.
properties.summary: A new and uncommon psychedelic tryptamine related to 5-MeO-DALT. Little is known about the drug, however its effects are likely similar to other psychedelic tryptamines.
